### 🚀 Features

- update craft to v0.0.13 in Zig generated definitions ([69df32f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/69df32f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- update craft to v0.0.13 with auto-version recipe ([a3d984e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a3d984e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- support installing packages published via `pantry publish` ([6cd18b6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6cd18b6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add craft package alias and registry entry ([2bdd195](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2bdd195)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add craft package alias and registry entry ([b6457b9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b6457b9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- delete pkgx YAML recipes, overrides, and migration scripts ([415eaa3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/415eaa3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- migrate 572 packages to native TS recipes, remove pkgx dependency ([1fc528b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1fc528b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add GitHub-based version discovery for native recipes ([e45d45f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e45d45f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- migrate 76 pre-built packages to native TS recipes ([b9ca182](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b9ca182)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add native TS recipe system with dual-loader ([b6bb643](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b6bb643)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Windows platform support for cross-platform apps ([bb5f3cb](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bb5f3cb)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- show desktop apps on pantry.dev homepage ([81e6901](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/81e6901)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add 6 Brewfile apps, fix 10 failing downloads, daily builds ([be495cd](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/be495cd)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add 20 more desktop apps + fix Cursor/OrbStack CDN downloads ([0656a8e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0656a8e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- **action**: add Discord and Slack release notifications ([b6dc8da](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b6dc8da)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add 30 desktop apps to pantry registry ([4237755](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4237755)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add auto-linking ability ([3efe43f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3efe43f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use Lilex for headings ([a6af60e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a6af60e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add IBM Plex Sans as body font, replace Inter ([392c162](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/392c162)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- switch from Google Fonts JetBrains Mono to self-hosted Lilex font ([3fb388c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3fb388c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- move checkpoint file into pantry/ dir, always clean up ([27074bc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/27074bc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use registry.pantry.dev instead of direct S3 for downloads ([bdda3af](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bdda3af)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use registry API for npm-style package resolution ([7c393f3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7c393f3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- make binary proxy e2e test resilient to store timing ([02c4f3c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/02c4f3c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- make auto-triggered builds and dashboard updates non-fatal ([5a1040b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5a1040b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- simplify version regex to avoid backtracking lint error ([7a36dd0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7a36dd0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- stricter version validation + don't fail builds when packages skipped ([0fd3f06](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0fd3f06)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- populate empty programs, rename RecipeDefinition→Recipe, clean up docs ([58091f4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/58091f4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- never remove existing versions when adding new ones ([dba892e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dba892e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve remaining CI test failures ([82736db](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/82736db)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve all CI failures ([491bb82](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/491bb82)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- escape quotes in recipe build scripts without losing content ([d77ac87](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d77ac87)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve 17 broken recipe files and import errors ([5e87982](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5e87982)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add unix platform option, auto-triggered builds skip Windows ([b993ac6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b993ac6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🚀 Features

- add `mole` alias for github.com/tw93/mole ([958735f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/958735f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add github.com/tw93/mole package (macOS deep clean & optimize CLI) ([e9051e9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e9051e9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- native PHP package installation without Composer dependency ([7caea19](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7caea19)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Composer to benchmarks + Pantry vs Composer comparison ([d0121a5](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d0121a5)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add analytics tracking for all download types ([61b1975](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/61b1975)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add user authentication, signup/login, and API token management ([ee45114](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ee45114)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- auto-sync build.zig.zon with pantry-installed zig deps ([95ee71c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/95ee71c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Packagist fallback for PHP package discovery ([8ad507e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8ad507e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add PHP/Composer ecosystem support ([309c8c3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/309c8c3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add comprehensive UI features inspired by npmx.dev ([a18c2b3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a18c2b3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add DELETE endpoint for zig packages ([79bc223](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/79bc223)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- improve pantry linking ([2e1c3b0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2e1c3b0)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add `pantry release` command for version bumping and releasing ([4527932](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4527932)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add zig package publishing to pantry action ([b786535](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b786535)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add subtle geometric pattern to hero section background ([53cd7df](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/53cd7df)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add paywall tests, zig package stats on homepage, and search type filter ([5681107](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5681107)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add package paywall support for paid packages ([d936206](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d936206)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- track downloads from CLI installs via analytics events API ([4e1d7bf](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4e1d7bf)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add ts-charts SVG charts to dashboard auth pages ([5304f2f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5304f2f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add npmx.dev-inspired features to pantry.dev website ([ae92aac](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ae92aac)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add test helpers ([e7a7b34](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e7a7b34)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- merge packages/site into packages/registry ([0f0ca31](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0f0ca31)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add GNU GRUB and xorriso as installable packages ([316eb75](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/316eb75)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- resolve symlinks in mole wrapper & handle MakePathFailed in global install ([b63a78a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b63a78a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- wire PHP installer into zero-deps path + update with real benchmarks ([34bec2b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/34bec2b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- rewrite Composer benchmarks with real measured results ([33cac4c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/33cac4c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use localStorage session tokens for CDN compatibility ([14f0305](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/14f0305)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use git reset --hard for deploy to handle divergent branches ([3935756](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3935756)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use pantry-installed zig-config via local path dependency ([a3fe613](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a3fe613)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- stop suppressing bunpress build errors in deploy ([d31dca3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d31dca3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- include Windows in platform listings ([aea213c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/aea213c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- merge platforms and architectures into one stat card ([0bee7d2](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0bee7d2)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- skip service tests in CI environments ([b33361a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b33361a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve CI lint, typecheck, and test failures ([cc88017](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/cc88017)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- show zig-specific install commands on package pages ([45c90be](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/45c90be)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- handle .@\"quoted-name\" syntax in parseZigZon ([03158ea](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/03158ea)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- show actual HTTP error from zig publish instead of opaque curl exit 22 ([dfe4ead](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dfe4ead)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- write zig manifest to temp file before curl upload ([7de1758](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7de1758)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- action skipped zig publish when install=false ([39e603a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/39e603a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- zig publish route reads PANTRY_TOKEN env var fallback ([40148cc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/40148cc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- persist zig packages to DynamoDB + S3 instead of in-memory ([6d459f8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6d459f8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- always show zig package count on homepage ([23e623a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/23e623a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- detect bumped dependency versions in pantry install ([014ece6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/014ece6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- reflect that pantry manages system packages AND the full npm registry ([db0fb97](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/db0fb97)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use registry.pantry.dev for analytics (CloudFront blocks POST to pantry.dev) ([8296552](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8296552)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- tab layout — use flex-wrap so content panels flow below tab labels ([891e169](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/891e169)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- move all template computations to server handlers ([8cd448d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8cd448d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- strip STX-injected duplicate twitter:title meta tags ([9470b44](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9470b44)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- 5 more issues — 404 page, OG titles, canonical URLs, meta descriptions ([bdb9a77](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bdb9a77)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- strip STX-injected default meta tags to prevent OG duplicates ([d7e5000](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d7e5000)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- 5 issues — script client tags, dynamic pkg count, meta dedup, copy buttons ([03150a3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/03150a3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- search page defaults to HTML, limit download enrichment to 20 results ([31ef859](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/31ef859)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use published @ts-charts/* v0.2.0 for server-side chart generation ([6775784](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6775784)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- improve GitHub release version resolution in action ([f3f94fc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/f3f94fc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use project-local bunpress for docs build so crosswind resolves ([10b72e9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/10b72e9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add crosswind dep so bunpress generates utility CSS for docs ([33aaf28](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/33aaf28)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- site routes - S3 fallback for metadata and content-negotiated search ([2f3d678](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2f3d678)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve CI typecheck and test failures from launchpad->pantry rename ([64b478f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/64b478f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- preserve custom package metadata during automated updates ([162c505](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/162c505)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- validate cache has binaries before skipping install ([ae41a9e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ae41a9e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### ⚡ Performance Improvements

- replace curl subprocess with native Zig HTTP for PHP downloads ([53b0ab0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/53b0ab0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- rebuild with 56 optimizations — pantry now 53-2,330x faster than Composer ([3c95100](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3c95100)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- 15 more optimizations across the install pipeline ([5fd1f65](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5fd1f65)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- _Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>_

### 🚀 Features

- add `mole` alias for github.com/tw93/mole ([958735f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/958735f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add github.com/tw93/mole package (macOS deep clean & optimize CLI) ([e9051e9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e9051e9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- native PHP package installation without Composer dependency ([7caea19](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7caea19)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Composer to benchmarks + Pantry vs Composer comparison ([d0121a5](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d0121a5)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add analytics tracking for all download types ([61b1975](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/61b1975)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add user authentication, signup/login, and API token management ([ee45114](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ee45114)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- auto-sync build.zig.zon with pantry-installed zig deps ([95ee71c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/95ee71c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Packagist fallback for PHP package discovery ([8ad507e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8ad507e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add PHP/Composer ecosystem support ([309c8c3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/309c8c3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add comprehensive UI features inspired by npmx.dev ([a18c2b3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a18c2b3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add DELETE endpoint for zig packages ([79bc223](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/79bc223)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- improve pantry linking ([2e1c3b0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2e1c3b0)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add `pantry release` command for version bumping and releasing ([4527932](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4527932)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add zig package publishing to pantry action ([b786535](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b786535)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add subtle geometric pattern to hero section background ([53cd7df](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/53cd7df)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add paywall tests, zig package stats on homepage, and search type filter ([5681107](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5681107)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add package paywall support for paid packages ([d936206](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d936206)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- track downloads from CLI installs via analytics events API ([4e1d7bf](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4e1d7bf)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add ts-charts SVG charts to dashboard auth pages ([5304f2f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5304f2f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add npmx.dev-inspired features to pantry.dev website ([ae92aac](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ae92aac)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add test helpers ([e7a7b34](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e7a7b34)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- merge packages/site into packages/registry ([0f0ca31](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0f0ca31)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add GNU GRUB and xorriso as installable packages ([316eb75](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/316eb75)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- resolve symlinks in mole wrapper & handle MakePathFailed in global install ([b63a78a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b63a78a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- wire PHP installer into zero-deps path + update with real benchmarks ([34bec2b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/34bec2b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- rewrite Composer benchmarks with real measured results ([33cac4c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/33cac4c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use localStorage session tokens for CDN compatibility ([14f0305](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/14f0305)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use git reset --hard for deploy to handle divergent branches ([3935756](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3935756)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use pantry-installed zig-config via local path dependency ([a3fe613](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a3fe613)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- stop suppressing bunpress build errors in deploy ([d31dca3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d31dca3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- include Windows in platform listings ([aea213c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/aea213c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- merge platforms and architectures into one stat card ([0bee7d2](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0bee7d2)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- skip service tests in CI environments ([b33361a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b33361a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve CI lint, typecheck, and test failures ([cc88017](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/cc88017)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- show zig-specific install commands on package pages ([45c90be](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/45c90be)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- handle .@\"quoted-name\" syntax in parseZigZon ([03158ea](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/03158ea)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- show actual HTTP error from zig publish instead of opaque curl exit 22 ([dfe4ead](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dfe4ead)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- write zig manifest to temp file before curl upload ([7de1758](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7de1758)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- action skipped zig publish when install=false ([39e603a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/39e603a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- zig publish route reads PANTRY_TOKEN env var fallback ([40148cc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/40148cc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- persist zig packages to DynamoDB + S3 instead of in-memory ([6d459f8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6d459f8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- always show zig package count on homepage ([23e623a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/23e623a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- detect bumped dependency versions in pantry install ([014ece6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/014ece6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- reflect that pantry manages system packages AND the full npm registry ([db0fb97](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/db0fb97)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use registry.pantry.dev for analytics (CloudFront blocks POST to pantry.dev) ([8296552](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8296552)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- tab layout — use flex-wrap so content panels flow below tab labels ([891e169](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/891e169)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- move all template computations to server handlers ([8cd448d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8cd448d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- strip STX-injected duplicate twitter:title meta tags ([9470b44](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9470b44)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- 5 more issues — 404 page, OG titles, canonical URLs, meta descriptions ([bdb9a77](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bdb9a77)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- strip STX-injected default meta tags to prevent OG duplicates ([d7e5000](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d7e5000)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- 5 issues — script client tags, dynamic pkg count, meta dedup, copy buttons ([03150a3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/03150a3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- search page defaults to HTML, limit download enrichment to 20 results ([31ef859](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/31ef859)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use published @ts-charts/* v0.2.0 for server-side chart generation ([6775784](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6775784)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- improve GitHub release version resolution in action ([f3f94fc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/f3f94fc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use project-local bunpress for docs build so crosswind resolves ([10b72e9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/10b72e9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add crosswind dep so bunpress generates utility CSS for docs ([33aaf28](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/33aaf28)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- site routes - S3 fallback for metadata and content-negotiated search ([2f3d678](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2f3d678)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve CI typecheck and test failures from launchpad->pantry rename ([64b478f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/64b478f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- preserve custom package metadata during automated updates ([162c505](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/162c505)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- also fix ts-cloud/aws import in build-package.ts ([b386dd6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b386dd6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use main ts-cloud import instead of broken /aws subpath ([c711279](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/c711279)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- rename unused filter param to fix lint error ([a2e4cf7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a2e4cf7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bust stale cache with v2 key prefix + deps file hash ([af117d4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/af117d4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- extract system deps from all supported deps file formats ([3faec86](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3faec86)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- install system deps from deps.yaml separately in workspaces ([056cda1](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/056cda1)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- include pantry version in cache key to bust stale caches ([fda75b5](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fda75b5)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- validate cache has binaries before skipping install ([ae41a9e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ae41a9e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### ⚡ Performance Improvements

- replace curl subprocess with native Zig HTTP for PHP downloads ([53b0ab0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/53b0ab0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- rebuild with 56 optimizations — pantry now 53-2,330x faster than Composer ([3c95100](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3c95100)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- 11 more optimizations across npm, cache, config, lifecycle ([2b29285](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2b29285)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- 15 more optimizations across the install pipeline ([5fd1f65](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5fd1f65)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- replace std.posix.close with std.c.close for zig 0.16 compat ([202c34b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/202c34b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- typecheck error and e2e test assertion ([7be9413](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7be9413)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- restore package.json after pantry install zig ([a701bf4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a701bf4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use readFileSync instead of Bun.file in e2e tests ([94fcd49](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/94fcd49)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- fix CI typecheck errors and zig install path ([c11e31f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/c11e31f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- install zig globally and bun via official installer in CI ([3db7283](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3db7283)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- pantry action uses --no-save to prevent modifying package.json ([2e7cb55](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2e7cb55)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- install bun via official installer to fix postinstall check ([a14b51a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a14b51a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- use bun install --ignore-scripts in CI ([9646bf5](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9646bf5)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- stub node_modules/bun to bypass postinstall check ([9f9a675](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9f9a675)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use bun install without --trust flag ([c78617e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/c78617e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add bun to trustedDependencies, simplify CI ([18646f4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/18646f4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- pantry action adds .bin to PATH with setup-only+packages ([1ffc339](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1ffc339)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use pantry action for all CI setup, fix bun postinstall ([8608811](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8608811)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🚀 Features

- update cloud.config.ts with full infrastructure config ([18b5619](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/18b5619)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- rewrite pantry.dev UI with crosswind + deploy workflow ([855d3ed](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/855d3ed)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- use git fetch + reset on EC2 to handle rebased commits ([7c89e03](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7c89e03)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- show registry-only packages + speed up deploys ([8648a18](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8648a18)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- verify deployment via SSH since port 3001 not publicly exposed ([bbe4f3e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bbe4f3e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- skip bun install for stx clone (ts-cloud dep not on npm) ([72cd281](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/72cd281)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- patch stx from source (renderTemplate not in npm 0.2.6) ([d1f5684](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d1f5684)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- force reinstall deps and add stx debug output ([28bef30](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/28bef30)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- clean node_modules and upgrade bun on EC2 before deploy ([cbd2a3a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/cbd2a3a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- install deps from repo root and update bun on EC2 ([368920b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/368920b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use sudo for zero-downtime health check on EC2 ([83ce5a1](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/83ce5a1)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use bunx cloud for deployment, zero-downtime restarts ([1782fca](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1782fca)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- import CloudConfig from @ts-cloud/core and exclude .cache from typecheck ([2024ad8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2024ad8)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- update ts-cloud import and bump to @stacksjs/ts-cloud@0.2.2 ([0791625](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0791625)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve CI failures in style.zig format, zig-config hash, and cloud config typecheck ([25759e1](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/25759e1)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_

### Contributors

[Compare changes](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/compare/v0.8.3...v0.8.4)

### 🚀 Features

- npm publish ([224bbac](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/224bbac)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- track all version requests with known/unknown filter ([cfe2936](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/cfe2936)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add requested versions dashboard to registry ([9f7c4e1](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9f7c4e1)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- inject Crosswind CSS into dashboard pages ([89399fa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/89399fa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- deploy registry to AWS Lambda and migrate to registry.pantry.dev ([9f18fd4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9f18fd4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Discord health monitoring alerts across all workflows ([0774984](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0774984)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- auto-trigger builds when pantry recipes change from pkgx sync ([9b0c48d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9b0c48d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add pre-built overrides for crystal, dart, remove nim/vlang/rebar3 from exclusions ([a726fbc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a726fbc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add pre-built binary overrides for all Haskell packages ([392a371](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/392a371)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- auto-trigger S3 builds when version updates are committed ([a465533](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a465533)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add WithContext variants for Kafka, OpenSearch, and RabbitMQ services ([5c49fc8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5c49fc8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add continuous releases step to CI workflow ([f7ffc3e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/f7ffc3e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add mercure.rocks darwin platform override ([5e03731](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5e03731)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- run health check tests after successful builds ([422b7b4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/422b7b4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add memcached, typesense, minio, valkey to sync-packages ([e5a6ec7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e5a6ec7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add dep version constraint matching and fix build overrides ([ebe7bb3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ebe7bb3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- multi-version sync and PHP PDO MySQL/PostgreSQL support ([06b8046](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/06b8046)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- use io_helper APIs instead of std.fs.cwd() for Zig 0.16 compat ([5e39e3f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5e39e3f)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- return null instead of void in loadDatabaseConfig ([3b3a929](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3b3a929)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve test failures and format zig files ([beb473a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/beb473a)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve lint and typecheck errors ([6b52391](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6b52391)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- serf GSSAPI arg, gdal JPEG12, openinterpreter poetry ([570698f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/570698f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- batch fixes for failing packages ([acc80ab](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/acc80ab)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- aspell darwin disable NLS to avoid libintl dependency ([dcc27ea](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dcc27ea)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add gnu.org/gcc and libstdcxx to knownBrokenDomains ([0fe257d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0fe257d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- reorder prependScript after modifyRecipe, define PKGX_DIR in buildkit ([d5be75e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d5be75e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- generic pkgx compat — define PKGX_DIR, strip fix-shebangs, arrow PKGX_DIR, git-scm osxkeychain ([d510bfd](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d510bfd)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- erlang cc_wrapper bypass, nmap getopt.h, sftpgo gtpl rename ([2e3c4c2](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2e3c4c2)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- generic autoconf removal, bzip2 nullglob, liblmdb tag format, cocogitto workspace, fishshell gettext, aspell dict tolerance ([87fdbb9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/87fdbb9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🚀 Features

- npm publish ([224bbac](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/224bbac)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- track all version requests with known/unknown filter ([cfe2936](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/cfe2936)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add requested versions dashboard to registry ([9f7c4e1](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9f7c4e1)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- inject Crosswind CSS into dashboard pages ([89399fa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/89399fa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- deploy registry to AWS Lambda and migrate to registry.pantry.dev ([9f18fd4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9f18fd4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Discord health monitoring alerts across all workflows ([0774984](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0774984)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- auto-trigger builds when pantry recipes change from pkgx sync ([9b0c48d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9b0c48d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add pre-built overrides for crystal, dart, remove nim/vlang/rebar3 from exclusions ([a726fbc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a726fbc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add pre-built binary overrides for all Haskell packages ([392a371](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/392a371)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- auto-trigger S3 builds when version updates are committed ([a465533](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a465533)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add WithContext variants for Kafka, OpenSearch, and RabbitMQ services ([5c49fc8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5c49fc8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add continuous releases step to CI workflow ([f7ffc3e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/f7ffc3e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add mercure.rocks darwin platform override ([5e03731](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5e03731)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- run health check tests after successful builds ([422b7b4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/422b7b4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add memcached, typesense, minio, valkey to sync-packages ([e5a6ec7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e5a6ec7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add dep version constraint matching and fix build overrides ([ebe7bb3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ebe7bb3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- multi-version sync and PHP PDO MySQL/PostgreSQL support ([06b8046](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/06b8046)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- use io_helper APIs instead of std.fs.cwd() for Zig 0.16 compat ([5e39e3f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5e39e3f)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- return null instead of void in loadDatabaseConfig ([3b3a929](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3b3a929)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve test failures and format zig files ([beb473a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/beb473a)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve lint and typecheck errors ([6b52391](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6b52391)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- serf GSSAPI arg, gdal JPEG12, openinterpreter poetry ([570698f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/570698f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- batch fixes for failing packages ([acc80ab](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/acc80ab)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- aspell darwin disable NLS to avoid libintl dependency ([dcc27ea](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dcc27ea)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add gnu.org/gcc and libstdcxx to knownBrokenDomains ([0fe257d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0fe257d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- reorder prependScript after modifyRecipe, define PKGX_DIR in buildkit ([d5be75e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d5be75e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- generic pkgx compat — define PKGX_DIR, strip fix-shebangs, arrow PKGX_DIR, git-scm osxkeychain ([d510bfd](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d510bfd)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- erlang cc_wrapper bypass, nmap getopt.h, sftpgo gtpl rename ([2e3c4c2](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2e3c4c2)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- generic autoconf removal, bzip2 nullglob, liblmdb tag format, cocogitto workspace, fishshell gettext, aspell dict tolerance ([87fdbb9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/87fdbb9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bypass cc_wrapper for netcdf on Linux (.base64 pseudo-op error) ([910cbf2](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/910cbf2)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- restrict surya to darwin-arm64 only (Linux packaging.licenses unsolvable) ([3c8f003](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3c8f003)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- replace poetry with pip for surya build (packaging.licenses compat) ([deb6881](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/deb6881)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- snaplet --legacy-peer-deps, tcl-lang tclsh path, netcdf PKGX_DIR ([7998d4e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7998d4e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- upgrade packaging in surya venv for Linux compat ([b54b53e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b54b53e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- only track missing version requests for known valid versions ([35ceb32](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/35ceb32)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- package route regex greedily captured version as part of name ([5fa94c4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5fa94c4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- inline formatDate to avoid nested const in stx server script ([5f35efd](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5f35efd)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- unblock 9 packages from knownBrokenDomains with targeted overrides ([d6dbd3e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d6dbd3e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- preserve auth token across dashboard navigation ([9f938b9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9f938b9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- replace python-venv-stubber.sh with inline venv wrapper for text-gen-webui ([36aa5d0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/36aa5d0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- remove pydantic version pin for text-generation-webui ([01d8bf2](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/01d8bf2)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- override constraints replace TS deps instead of merging ([2c15f90](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2c15f90)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use overridden recipe deps for version constraint resolution ([59fe94a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/59fe94a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- unblock openinterpreter.com and gource.io builds ([6e94362](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6e94362)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- pin text-generation-webui to Python <3.14 ([458ce3e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/458ce3e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve build failures for cargo-c and text-generation-webui ([7a7fa71](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7a7fa71)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- raise health monitor failure threshold to 10 ([d6babc0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d6babc0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- tighten health monitor failure window to 2h ([607ee00](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/607ee00)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### Contributors

[Compare changes](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/compare/v0.8.2...v0.8.3)

### 🚀 Features

- multi-version builds + DynamoDB version request tracking ([f9a9e3c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/f9a9e3c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- make install directory configurable via pantry.toml modulesDir ([402ac77](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/402ac77)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add "commit publishing" ([03ed11c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/03ed11c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- install npm packages to node_modules/ for Node.js compatibility ([339bae6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/339bae6)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add --github-release flag to publish command ([08edd32](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/08edd32)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- expand durable override system to 89 packages, fix 28 more broken packages ([a0028d7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a0028d7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add GitHub Actions Job Summary for build failures ([1d2a02a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1d2a02a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- use spinlock for Mutex on Zig 0.16 ([8e1923b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8e1923b)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- apply lint auto-fixes for prefer-template, quotes, and formatting ([194d390](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/194d390)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve Zig 0.16 CI build errors ([60291ea](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/60291ea)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve lint errors in build scripts ([d73e8d8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d73e8d8)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- proper toolchain fixes for multi-version failures instead of skipping ([b403373](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b403373)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bundle @loader_path transitive deps from Homebrew libraries ([66d8768](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/66d8768)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- multi-version build failures — skip broken old versions, fix overrides ([fcb26dc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fcb26dc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- find symlinked dylibs during @rpath dep bundling ([9c5c75e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9c5c75e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- also search Homebrew for @rpath dep bundling ([5b61309](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5b61309)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- deduplicate package-overrides entries and fix unused param lint error ([0901c15](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0901c15)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- search /tmp/buildkit-deps for @rpath dep bundling ([2dc738f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2dc738f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bundle @rpath dep libraries from other build prefixes ([3a58bfa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3a58bfa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- only update latestVersion when uploading a newer version ([b3969c0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b3969c0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- multi-version summary shows double @version in output ([1b61655](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1b61655)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- isMachO signed integer overflow — Mach-O detection never matched arm64 ([6fc5e81](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6fc5e81)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bundle build-path dep libraries into packages for self-containment ([214237c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/214237c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — use CamelCase boost_systemConfigVersion.cmake filename ([e588c47](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e588c47)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- meilisearch download URLs, MySQL version detection, SQLite array distributable ([dc1242e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dc1242e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — always overwrite boost_system cmake configs ([be4bea8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/be4bea8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- JSDoc comment in fix-up.ts prematurely closed by glob path ([bc8f279](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bc8f279)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- Laravel stack — bundle Homebrew dylibs, support vendored packages, add meilisearch ([ff17ce6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ff17ce6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — use correct PACKAGE_VERSION format in boost_system cmake config ([8dc3033](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8dc3033)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- buildkit sed wrapper — find gsed in Homebrew opt path when not linked ([1098c1d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1098c1d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — create missing boost_system cmake config for Homebrew boost 1.90 ([2f23303](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2f23303)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- openresty — find gsed via Homebrew opt path when not linked ([967d48d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/967d48d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — bypass BoostConfig.cmake, use FindBoost module instead ([6fd155a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6fd155a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- openresty gsed shim for BSD sed compat, nx.dev npm cache fix on darwin ([92d5cc0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/92d5cc0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — add brew --prefix boost to CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH directly ([b390dfa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b390dfa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- re-add openinterpreter to knownBrokenDomains — dep resolver ignores Python version constraints ([1bc2ff5](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1bc2ff5)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal boost link, openinterpreter python cap, darwin broken list ([199f18f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/199f18f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- openinterpreter poetry-core build dep, add pytz/mergestat to darwin broken ([df02989](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/df02989)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- gnome-extensions-cli — use pip --no-build-isolation instead of poetry ([2db9bf3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2db9bf3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- quote curl URLs in duti override to prevent nullglob expansion ([8d69549](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8d69549)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve version.tag from git ref field for git-based distributable URLs ([7961ec7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7961ec7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- upgrade packaging lib in bkpyvenv for Python 3.14 poetry compat ([e23dd65](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e23dd65)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve lint errors — replace unbounded regex quantifiers ([cbf1378](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/cbf1378)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- luv cmake install path — use perl to fix cmake_install.cmake after build ([a28afda](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a28afda)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- make bitcoin.org patchelf steps error-tolerant ([0331f0a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0331f0a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- luv cmake Lua 5.5 version detection — patch CMakeLists.txt directly ([0054c0b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0054c0b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add venv bin to PATH in bkpyvenv stage for poetry/engine tools ([09f0d7c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/09f0d7c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- pin setuptools<78 globally (pkg_resources removed in 78+), fix luv cmake version detection ([327fdb7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/327fdb7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bkpyvenv stage --engine= flag parsing, poetry support ([6ae7503](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6ae7503)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- thefuck manual venv build, ensurepip for Python 3.14 venvs ([0f221aa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0f221aa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- unblock podlators, macos-term-size, mecab-ipadic, luv ([08acce4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/08acce4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- setuptools for Python 3.14, date-based tag matching, Rust fixes ([0d7b8aa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0d7b8aa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- unbreak mypy, werf, nx, poppler — 4 more packages for S3 ([8c1d42d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8c1d42d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### Contributors

- _ < true regex, remove darwin LDFLAGS rpath>_
- _Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>_
- _glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>_

[Compare changes](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/compare/v0.8.2...HEAD)

### 🚀 Features

- multi-version builds + DynamoDB version request tracking ([f9a9e3c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/f9a9e3c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- make install directory configurable via pantry.toml modulesDir ([402ac77](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/402ac77)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add "commit publishing" ([03ed11c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/03ed11c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- install npm packages to node_modules/ for Node.js compatibility ([339bae6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/339bae6)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add --github-release flag to publish command ([08edd32](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/08edd32)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- expand durable override system to 89 packages, fix 28 more broken packages ([a0028d7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a0028d7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add GitHub Actions Job Summary for build failures ([1d2a02a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1d2a02a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- use spinlock for Mutex on Zig 0.16 ([8e1923b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8e1923b)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- apply lint auto-fixes for prefer-template, quotes, and formatting ([194d390](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/194d390)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve Zig 0.16 CI build errors ([60291ea](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/60291ea)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- resolve lint errors in build scripts ([d73e8d8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d73e8d8)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- proper toolchain fixes for multi-version failures instead of skipping ([b403373](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b403373)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bundle @loader_path transitive deps from Homebrew libraries ([66d8768](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/66d8768)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- multi-version build failures — skip broken old versions, fix overrides ([fcb26dc](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fcb26dc)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- find symlinked dylibs during @rpath dep bundling ([9c5c75e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9c5c75e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- also search Homebrew for @rpath dep bundling ([5b61309](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5b61309)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- deduplicate package-overrides entries and fix unused param lint error ([0901c15](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0901c15)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- search /tmp/buildkit-deps for @rpath dep bundling ([2dc738f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2dc738f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bundle @rpath dep libraries from other build prefixes ([3a58bfa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/3a58bfa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- only update latestVersion when uploading a newer version ([b3969c0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b3969c0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- multi-version summary shows double @version in output ([1b61655](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1b61655)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- isMachO signed integer overflow — Mach-O detection never matched arm64 ([6fc5e81](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6fc5e81)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bundle build-path dep libraries into packages for self-containment ([214237c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/214237c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — use CamelCase boost_systemConfigVersion.cmake filename ([e588c47](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e588c47)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- meilisearch download URLs, MySQL version detection, SQLite array distributable ([dc1242e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dc1242e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — always overwrite boost_system cmake configs ([be4bea8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/be4bea8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- JSDoc comment in fix-up.ts prematurely closed by glob path ([bc8f279](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bc8f279)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- Laravel stack — bundle Homebrew dylibs, support vendored packages, add meilisearch ([ff17ce6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ff17ce6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — use correct PACKAGE_VERSION format in boost_system cmake config ([8dc3033](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8dc3033)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- buildkit sed wrapper — find gsed in Homebrew opt path when not linked ([1098c1d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1098c1d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — create missing boost_system cmake config for Homebrew boost 1.90 ([2f23303](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2f23303)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- openresty — find gsed via Homebrew opt path when not linked ([967d48d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/967d48d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — bypass BoostConfig.cmake, use FindBoost module instead ([6fd155a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6fd155a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- openresty gsed shim for BSD sed compat, nx.dev npm cache fix on darwin ([92d5cc0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/92d5cc0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal — add brew --prefix boost to CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH directly ([b390dfa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b390dfa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- re-add openinterpreter to knownBrokenDomains — dep resolver ignores Python version constraints ([1bc2ff5](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1bc2ff5)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- sfcgal boost link, openinterpreter python cap, darwin broken list ([199f18f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/199f18f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- openinterpreter poetry-core build dep, add pytz/mergestat to darwin broken ([df02989](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/df02989)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- gnome-extensions-cli — use pip --no-build-isolation instead of poetry ([2db9bf3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2db9bf3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- quote curl URLs in duti override to prevent nullglob expansion ([8d69549](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8d69549)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve version.tag from git ref field for git-based distributable URLs ([7961ec7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7961ec7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- upgrade packaging lib in bkpyvenv for Python 3.14 poetry compat ([e23dd65](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e23dd65)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve lint errors — replace unbounded regex quantifiers ([cbf1378](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/cbf1378)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- luv cmake install path — use perl to fix cmake_install.cmake after build ([a28afda](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a28afda)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- make bitcoin.org patchelf steps error-tolerant ([0331f0a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0331f0a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- luv cmake Lua 5.5 version detection — patch CMakeLists.txt directly ([0054c0b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0054c0b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add venv bin to PATH in bkpyvenv stage for poetry/engine tools ([09f0d7c](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/09f0d7c)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- pin setuptools<78 globally (pkg_resources removed in 78+), fix luv cmake version detection ([327fdb7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/327fdb7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- bkpyvenv stage --engine= flag parsing, poetry support ([6ae7503](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/6ae7503)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- thefuck manual venv build, ensurepip for Python 3.14 venvs ([0f221aa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0f221aa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- unblock podlators, macos-term-size, mecab-ipadic, luv ([08acce4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/08acce4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- remove duplicate luv override, unblock mecab-ipadic ([b7f9d10](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/b7f9d10)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- YAML folded scalar parser, pip --no-build-isolation fallback, chatblade skip ([ffa9409](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ffa9409)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- unbreak gauche (underscore tags) and amber (alpha suffix) ([7f3742f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7f3742f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolveGitHubTag fallback, build normalization, date-version matching ([4c9220e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4c9220e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- setuptools for Python 3.14, date-based tag matching, Rust fixes ([0d7b8aa](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0d7b8aa)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🚀 Features

- resolve GitHub tags via API to fix leading-zero version normalization ([4e4a3df](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4e4a3df)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build mode for fast CI testing, fix shell expansion bug ([51b37cb](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/51b37cb)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- port high-impact brewkit improvements to buildkit ([29b808a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/29b808a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build-package workflow for quick iteration ([fff7504](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fff7504)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- topological sort packages by dependency depth ([e7ccca4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e7ccca4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add buildkit to build all 1159 pantry packages from source ([d11cb59](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d11cb59)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- version build error ([432164e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/432164e)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_

- resolve lint errors in build scripts ([bfca3a6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bfca3a6)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_

- add glibtool symlink and ensure /opt/homebrew/bin in PATH on macOS ([be06f76](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/be06f76)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use DYLD_FALLBACK_LIBRARY_PATH on macOS, add missing Linux dev deps ([1829c60](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/1829c60)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- prevent sync-binaries runs from being cancelled by new triggers ([ed7364f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ed7364f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- remove Debian-patched setuptools/wheel instead of just upgrading ([ae9db43](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ae9db43)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve Python setuptools install_layout and missing Go on macOS ([a068637](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a068637)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- isolate cargo/rustup per-build and add gfortran support ([2eb35e8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/2eb35e8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- prevent find ([5a22773](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5a22773)) _(by head SIGPIPE crash in cargo fallback with set -eo pipefail <Chris>)_
- BSD sed compatibility, findYamls traversal bug, and string build detection ([7dd7dde](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/7dd7dde)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve cargo PATH detection, macOS deployment target, and obsolete linker flags ([5cd9fad](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5cd9fad)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- handle trailing .0 in version matching and multiline transform regex ([87e6dfd](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/87e6dfd)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- handle more build edge cases (permissions, .war files, cargo-c, libxslt) ([8ba5dda](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8ba5dda)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- clear bash hash table before build script to fix cargo not found ([61edcec](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/61edcec)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- windows cross-compilation errors in io_helper, extractor, installer, package ([5d8f500](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5d8f500)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add 8 more packages to known broken list ([49fa72d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/49fa72d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

- add python-venv.py script shim for pkgx YAML recipes ([ab71b50](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ab71b50)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- reduce per-package timeout to 30 min and add batch time budget ([9d257d6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9d257d6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- strip YAML quotes from array items in parser ([74bbf54](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/74bbf54)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- create cargo symlinks before Rust toolchain search ([90042e8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/90042e8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- source rustup env for reliable cargo discovery + add diagnostics ([722092f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/722092f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add pwmt.org/girara and zathura to knownBrokenDomains ([a9d0af7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a9d0af7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- move x.org/x11 local-transport override from YAML to buildkit code ([a5afa52](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a5afa52)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- only activate GCC specs workaround on Linux, not macOS ([a36f6d8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/a36f6d8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- disable local-transport for x.org/x11 on Linux (sys/stropts.h removed in glibc 2.38+) ([06e31c4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/06e31c4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- correct YAML multiline scalar continuation indent from +4 to +2 ([4b01ce1](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4b01ce1)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- show tail of generated build script on failure to see user commands ([0dae0c7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/0dae0c7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- don't add default -o for preprocessor invocations in specs workaround ([073fb43](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/073fb43)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- also wrap cpp in cc_wrapper to handle ./specs directory ([75a4c0e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/75a4c0e)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### Contributors

- _Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>_
- _glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>_
- _head SIGPIPE crash in cargo fallback with set -eo pipefail <Chris>_

[Compare changes](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/compare/v0.8.0...HEAD)

### 🚀 Features

- resolve GitHub tags via API to fix leading-zero version normalization ([4e4a3df](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4e4a3df)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build mode for fast CI testing, fix shell expansion bug ([51b37cb](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/51b37cb)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- port high-impact brewkit improvements to buildkit ([29b808a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/29b808a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build-package workflow for quick iteration ([fff7504](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fff7504)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- topological sort packages by dependency depth ([e7ccca4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e7ccca4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add buildkit to build all 1159 pantry packages from source ([d11cb59](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d11cb59)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- version build error ([432164e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/432164e)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add 117 more packages to known-broken list from run 22169381361 ([bf6f725](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bf6f725)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve lint errors in build scripts ([bfca3a6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/bfca3a6)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_
- add 12 more packages to known-broken list from batches 15-19 ([4764087](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4764087)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add more packages to known-broken list from batches 13-18 ([78ee16a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/78ee16a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### Contributors

[Compare changes](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/compare/v0.8.0...HEAD)

### 🚀 Features

- resolve GitHub tags via API to fix leading-zero version normalization ([4e4a3df](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4e4a3df)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build mode for fast CI testing, fix shell expansion bug ([51b37cb](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/51b37cb)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- port high-impact brewkit improvements to buildkit ([29b808a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/29b808a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build-package workflow for quick iteration ([fff7504](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fff7504)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- topological sort packages by dependency depth ([e7ccca4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e7ccca4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add buildkit to build all 1159 pantry packages from source ([d11cb59](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d11cb59)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### Contributors

- _Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>_
- _glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>_
- _head SIGPIPE crash in cargo fallback with set -eo pipefail <Chris>_

[Compare changes](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1)

### 🚀 Features

- resolve GitHub tags via API to fix leading-zero version normalization ([4e4a3df](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/4e4a3df)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build mode for fast CI testing, fix shell expansion bug ([51b37cb](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/51b37cb)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- port high-impact brewkit improvements to buildkit ([29b808a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/29b808a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add targeted build-package workflow for quick iteration ([fff7504](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fff7504)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- topological sort packages by dependency depth ([e7ccca4](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e7ccca4)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add buildkit to build all 1159 pantry packages from source ([d11cb59](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/d11cb59)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- version build error ([432164e](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/432164e)) _(by glennmichael123 <gtorregosa@gmail.com>)_

- prevent find ([5a22773](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5a22773)) _(by head SIGPIPE crash in cargo fallback with set -eo pipefail <Chris>)_

- YAML dep extraction, platform filtering, meson venv, install -D shim, URL parsing ([723d92b](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/723d92b)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- strip trailing .0 from versions on download failure ([9168e87](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9168e87)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- fix pkg-config in downloaded deps, add system pkg-config paths ([946b4b6](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/946b4b6)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- version fallback, meson venv, dep path pollution, fix-shebangs shim, direct build arrays ([9651099](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/9651099)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- handle multi-line plain scalar continuation in YAML arrays ([520c4db](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/520c4db)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- YAML parser overhaul for run arrays, working-directory, inline mappings ([82675e3](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/82675e3)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- URL-encode source URLs and validate download size ([5bb5519](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5bb5519)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve Go GOROOT mismatch, -pie LDFLAGS, and version 404s ([e9cc094](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e9cc094)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- YAML parser for if:/working-directory, skip broken recipes, exit 0 ([42eddc9](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/42eddc9)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- preserve system toolchains, add shims, smart filtering ([fcfcbf0](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/fcfcbf0)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- complex strip patterns, GNU sed on macOS, regex for nested / ([ba6a319](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/ba6a319)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- handle git+https sources, smart version.tag, exit non-zero on failures ([e60712a](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e60712a)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve template interpolation, YAML parsing, S3 binary download issues ([e3f6c53](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/e3f6c53)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- prevent batch crash on cleanup errors, fix compiler flag ordering ([73f16d7](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/73f16d7)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- dynamic python version, linux build deps for postgres ([dce1638](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/dce1638)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- add Linux support for postgres/mysql, update python URL ([8e48f3d](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/8e48f3d)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use direct symlink instead of bun link for ts-cloud in CI ([5ca7dfe](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/5ca7dfe)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- use ts-cloud via bun link for S3 operations ([41c3aa8](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/41c3aa8)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
- resolve module resolution and GitHub API rate limits in CI ([43de03f](https://github.com/home-lang/pantry/commit/43de03f)) _(by Chris <chrisbreuer93@gmail.com>)_
